requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service and NFPA 855 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——安提瓜和巴布达消防局及NFPA 855要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——安提瓜和巴布達消防局及NFPA 855要求

summary.en: The Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Antigua and Barbuda. All commercial and industrial facilities — including BESS installations — require fire safety inspection and approval before commissioning. Antigua and Barbuda has historically referenced NFPA (National Fire Protection Association) codes alongside British Standards, given the Caribbean region's dual exposure to US and UK fire safety frameworks. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the dominant international code for BESS fire-safety installation design and is expected to be referenced in BESS project specifications. Formal adoption of NFPA 855 by the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the Fire Service before project design is finalised. Project developers and EPCs should engage the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service at the earliest project stage.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达消防局是安提瓜和巴布达消防安全的主管机关。所有商业及工业设施——包括BESS装置——均须在投入使用前取得消防安全检查和批准。安提瓜和巴布达历来兼参NFPA（美国消防协会）规范和英国标准，这反映了加勒比地区同时受美国和英国消防安全框架影响的特点。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是BESS消防安全安装设计的主导国际规范，预计将在BESS项目规格中被引用。截至本数据集日期，安提瓜和巴布达消防局专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向消防局核实。项目开发商和EPC承包商应在项目最早阶段与安提瓜和巴布达消防局接触。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達消防局是安提瓜和巴布達消防安全的主管機關。所有商業及工業設施——包括BESS裝置——均須在投入使用前取得消防安全檢查和批准。安提瓜和巴布達歷來兼參NFPA（美國消防協會）規範和英國標準，這反映了加勒比地區同時受美國和英國消防安全框架影響的特點。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是BESS消防安全安裝設計的主導國際規範，預計將在BESS項目規格中被引用。截至本數據集日期，安提瓜和巴布達消防局專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向消防局核實。項目開發商和EPC承包商應在項目最早階段與安提瓜和巴布達消防局接觸。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal adoption by Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service for BESS specifically unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (fire suppression reference in Caribbean jurisdictions)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (fire alarm systems reference)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service — mandatory fire safety inspection and approval authority for commercial and industrial facilities

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through GB 44240-2024 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules), GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project-level fire authority review procedures. The GB 44240-2024 mandatory standard includes thermal runaway propagation testing requirements for BESS cells. Project-level fire-safety review in China follows local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Prevention Law (消防法). These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service as equivalent to NFPA-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for project fire-safety review in Antigua and Barbuda.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 44240-2024（包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定）、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目级消防主管机关审查程序管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024强制性标准包含BESS电芯热失控蔓延测试要求。中国的项目级消防审查依据《消防法》下的地方消防主管机关审批程序进行。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被安提瓜和巴布达消防局认可为等同于基于NFPA的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在安提瓜和巴布达项目消防安全审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 44240-2024（包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定）、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目級消防主管機關審查程序管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024強制性標準包含BESS電芯熱失控蔓延測試要求。中國的項目級消防審查依據《消防法》下的地方消防主管機關審批程序進行。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被安提瓜和巴布達消防局認可為等同於基於NFPA的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在安提瓜和巴布達項目消防安全審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety and thermal runaway propagation provisions; mandatory effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (includes system-level fire-related safety requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service approval is a mandatory project gate for all commercial and industrial BESS installations. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy the NFPA-based requirements expected by the Fire Service and project specifications. Project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted for BESS installations and determine any local derogations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design per NFPA 13, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) note that outdoor BESS installations in hurricane-prone Antigua may require additional structural and drainage provisions beyond NFPA 855 baseline for resilience under storm conditions; (d) engage a fire protection engineer familiar with NFPA codes and Caribbean jurisdiction practice for design review.
gap.zh: 差距：安提瓜和巴布达消防局批准是所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足消防局和项目规格预期的NFPA要求。项目团队应：（a）直接向安提瓜和巴布达消防局确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳用于BESS装置，并确定任何地方豁免；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、依据NFPA 13的抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）注意安提瓜飓风多发地区的户外BESS装置可能需要在NFPA 855基准之外增加结构和排水规定，以确保暴风天气下的韧性；（d）聘请熟悉NFPA规范和加勒比司法管辖实践的消防工程师进行设计审查。
gap.zht: 差距：安提瓜和巴布達消防局批准是所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足消防局和項目規格預期的NFPA要求。項目團隊應：（a）直接向安提瓜和巴布達消防局確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納用於BESS裝置，並確定任何地方豁免；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、依據NFPA 13的抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）注意安提瓜颶風多發地區的戶外BESS裝置可能需要在NFPA 855基準之外增加結構和排水規定，以確保暴風天氣下的韌性；（d）聘請熟悉NFPA規範和加勒比司法管轄實踐的消防工程師進行設計審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service inspection and approval required for all commercial and industrial BESS; formal NFPA 855 adoption for BESS specifically unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Fire Service
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project classification, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; not transferable to Antigua and Barbuda

source.publisher: National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) — NFPA 855 Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy the NFPA-based requirements expected by the Fire Service. Engage the Fire Service and a fire protection engineer familiar with NFPA codes and Caribbean practice at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code for BESS and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安提瓜和巴布达消防局批准是商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足消防局预期的NFPA要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与消防局及熟悉NFPA规范和加勒比实践的消防工程师接触，确认适用于BESS的消防规范及设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安提瓜和巴布達消防局批准是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足消防局預期的NFPA要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與消防局及熟悉NFPA規範和加勒比實踐的消防工程師接觸，確認適用於BESS的消防規範及設計要求。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal Runaway Propagation Testing and Suppression System Design for BESS in Antigua and Barbuda
requirement_topic.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达BESS热失控蔓延测试及抑制系统设计
requirement_topic.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達BESS熱失控蔓延測試及抑制系統設計

summary.en: NFPA 855 (the expected fire-safety reference for BESS in Antigua and Barbuda project specifications) requires thermal runaway propagation testing for BESS to demonstrate that a thermal event in one cell or module does not propagate to adjacent cells, modules, or battery units without providing adequate warning time for occupant notification and emergency response. NFPA 855 also specifies maximum BESS energy capacity thresholds per fire compartment, minimum separation distances, required fire-detection and suppression systems (gas-detection, smoke detection, automatic suppression), and emergency shutdown requirements. In the high-ambient-temperature environment of Antigua and Barbuda (average 26–32°C, with BESS enclosure temperatures potentially exceeding 40°C under direct Caribbean sun), the thermal management baseline for thermal runaway onset and propagation risk must account for elevated ambient versus standard NFPA 855 testing conditions. Project-specific fire engineering review should account for this climate factor.
summary.zh: NFPA 855（安提瓜和巴布达项目规格中BESS预期的消防安全参考标准）要求对BESS进行热失控蔓延测试，以证明单个电芯或模组的热事件不会蔓延至相邻电芯、模组或电池单元，同时为人员通知和应急响应提供足够的预警时间。NFPA 855还规定了每个防火分区的最大BESS能量容量阈值、最小隔离距离、所需的火灾探测和抑制系统（气体探测、烟感探测、自动抑制）以及紧急停机要求。在安提瓜和巴布达高环境温度条件下（平均26-32°C，在加勒比直射阳光下BESS外壳温度可能超过40°C），热失控起始和蔓延风险的热管理基准须考虑高于NFPA 855标准测试条件的环境温度因素。项目专项消防工程审查应考虑此气候因素。
summary.zht: NFPA 855（安提瓜和巴布達項目規格中BESS預期的消防安全參考標準）要求對BESS進行熱失控蔓延測試，以證明單個電芯或模組的熱事件不會蔓延至相鄰電芯、模組或電池單元，同時為人員通知和應急響應提供足夠的預警時間。NFPA 855還規定了每個防火分區的最大BESS能量容量閾值、最小隔離距離、所需的火災探測和抑制系統（氣體探測、煙感探測、自動抑制）以及緊急停機要求。在安提瓜和巴布達高環境溫度條件下（平均26-32°C，在加勒比直射陽光下BESS外殼溫度可能超過40°C），熱失控起始和蔓延風險的熱管理基準須考慮高於NFPA 855標準測試條件的環境溫度因素。項目專項消防工程審查應考慮此氣候因素。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855:2023 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems — Chapter 5 (thermal runaway propagation testing, energy limits per compartment, separation distances, suppression requirements)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (includes thermal runaway propagation test requirements)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
UL 9540A — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems (fire propagation test referenced by NFPA 855)

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 includes thermal runaway propagation testing requirements for BESS cells and modules, which overlap in concept with UL 9540A and IEC 62619 thermal runaway provisions. However, GB 44240-2024 test protocol parameters, pass/fail criteria, and test conditions differ from UL 9540A and IEC 62619. Test results from GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway propagation tests are not accepted as equivalent to UL 9540A test evidence referenced in NFPA 855. Exporters whose BESS cells and modules have GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway test results should obtain supplementary UL 9540A testing from an accredited laboratory if NFPA 855 compliance is required by the project or the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的热失控蔓延测试要求，与UL 9540A和IEC 62619热失控规定在概念上有重叠。然而，GB 44240-2024测试方案参数、通过/失败标准和测试条件与UL 9540A和IEC 62619不同。GB 44240-2024热失控蔓延测试结果不被接受为等同于NFPA 855中引用的UL 9540A测试证据。若项目或安提瓜和巴布达消防局要求NFPA 855合规，持有GB 44240-2024热失控测试结果的出口商应从认可实验室取得补充UL 9540A测试。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的熱失控蔓延測試要求，與UL 9540A和IEC 62619熱失控規定在概念上有重疊。然而，GB 44240-2024測試方案參數、通過/失敗標準和測試條件與UL 9540A和IEC 62619不同。GB 44240-2024熱失控蔓延測試結果不被接受為等同於NFPA 855中引用的UL 9540A測試證據。若項目或安提瓜和巴布達消防局要求NFPA 855合規，持有GB 44240-2024熱失控測試結果的出口商應從認可實驗室取得補充UL 9540A測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes thermal runaway propagation test requirements; not equivalent to UL 9540A referenced in NFPA 855)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (cell-level thermal and safety testing; not equivalent to IEC 62619 or UL 9540A)

gap.en: Gap: GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway propagation test results are not accepted as equivalent to UL 9540A evidence required by NFPA 855. Additionally, standard thermal runaway test conditions (typically at 25°C ambient) do not account for Antigua and Barbuda's elevated ambient temperatures, which may accelerate thermal runaway onset. Exporters should: (a) obtain UL 9540A thermal runaway propagation test evidence from an accredited laboratory for cells, modules, and unit-level assemblies to be used in Antigua BESS projects; (b) document thermal management performance at Antigua ambient temperatures (30–40°C) for project fire engineering review; (c) specify automatic gas detection (hydrogen fluoride, CO) and suppression system design per NFPA 855 and NFPA 13 requirements for the project site.
gap.zh: 差距：GB 44240-2024热失控蔓延测试结果不被接受为NFPA 855要求的UL 9540A证据的等效依据。此外，标准热失控测试条件（通常为25°C环境温度）未考虑安提瓜和巴布达的高环境温度，后者可能加速热失控起始。出口商应：（a）从认可实验室取得用于安提瓜BESS项目的电芯、模组和单元级组件的UL 9540A热失控蔓延测试证据；（b）为项目消防工程审查提供在安提瓜环境温度（30-40°C）下的热管理性能文件；（c）依据NFPA 855和NFPA 13要求，为项目现场规定自动气体探测（氟化氢、CO）和抑制系统设计。
gap.zht: 差距：GB 44240-2024熱失控蔓延測試結果不被接受為NFPA 855要求的UL 9540A證據的等效依據。此外，標準熱失控測試條件（通常為25°C環境溫度）未考慮安提瓜和巴布達的高環境溫度，後者可能加速熱失控起始。出口商應：（a）從認可實驗室取得用於安提瓜BESS項目的電芯、模組和單元級組件的UL 9540A熱失控蔓延測試證據；（b）為項目消防工程審查提供在安提瓜環境溫度（30-40°C）下的熱管理性能文件；（c）依據NFPA 855和NFPA 13要求，為項目現場規定自動氣體探測（氟化氫、CO）和抑制系統設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where NFPA 855 is applied by the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service for project approval; UL 9540A referenced in NFPA 855 as the thermal propagation test method; formal NFPA 855 adoption for BESS in Antigua unconfirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway propagation testing is mandatory for large-format BESS cells effective August 1, 2025; test protocol not equivalent to UL 9540A

source.publisher: National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) — NFPA 855 Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway propagation test results are not accepted as equivalent to UL 9540A evidence required by NFPA 855 in Antigua and Barbuda project specifications. Obtain UL 9540A test evidence from an accredited laboratory for all BESS cell and module assemblies. Account for Antigua's elevated ambient temperatures in thermal management and fire engineering design. Confirm NFPA 855 applicability with the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service before design is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 44240-2024热失控蔓延测试结果不被安提瓜和巴布达项目规格中NFPA 855要求的UL 9540A证据所接受为等效依据。请从认可实验室取得所有BESS电芯和模组组件的UL 9540A测试证据。在热管理和消防工程设计中考虑安提瓜的高环境温度。在设计最终确定前，向安提瓜和巴布达消防局确认NFPA 855的适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 44240-2024熱失控蔓延測試結果不被安提瓜和巴布達項目規格中NFPA 855要求的UL 9540A證據所接受為等效依據。請從認可實驗室取得所有BESS電芯和模組組件的UL 9540A測試證據。在熱管理和消防工程設計中考慮安提瓜的高環境溫度。在設計最終確定前，向安提瓜和巴布達消防局確認NFPA 855的適用性。

requirement_topic.en: Building Permits and Fire Safety Approval for Outdoor BESS Enclosures — Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning
requirement_topic.zh: 户外BESS外壳的建筑许可及消防安全批准——安提瓜和巴布达规划局
requirement_topic.zht: 戶外BESS外殼的建築許可及消防安全批准——安提瓜和巴布達規劃局

summary.en: Fixed BESS installations in Antigua and Barbuda — whether containerised, modular cabinet, or custom enclosure — constitute structures requiring building permits under the Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Act. The Physical Planning Unit (PPU) under the Ministry of Works is the building permit authority. All fixed outdoor structures must satisfy applicable Antigua and Barbuda building code requirements, including wind-load resistance appropriate for Category 4–5 hurricane exposure. Fire safety approvals from the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service must be obtained in conjunction with or following PPU building permit approval. For BESS projects co-located with solar PV installations on commercial or industrial sites, building permit and fire safety coordination with both PPU and the Fire Service should commence at the design stage. No publicly confirmed Antigua-specific BESS containerised enclosure building code requirement was identified from official sources as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达的固定式BESS装置——无论是集装箱式、模块化机柜还是定制外壳——均构成依据安提瓜和巴布达《规划法》须取得建筑许可的构筑物。工务部下属的规划局（PPU）是建筑许可主管机关。所有固定户外构筑物须满足适用的安提瓜和巴布达建筑规范要求，包括适合四至五级飓风暴露的风荷载抗力。安提瓜和巴布达消防局的消防安全批准须与PPU建筑许可批准同步或随后取得。对于与商业或工业场地太阳能光伏系统共址的BESS项目，与PPU和消防局的建筑许可和消防安全协调应在设计阶段启动。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认安提瓜针对BESS集装箱式外壳的专项建筑规范要求。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達的固定式BESS裝置——無論是集裝箱式、模組化機櫃還是定制外殼——均構成依據安提瓜和巴布達《規劃法》須取得建築許可的構築物。工務部下屬的規劃局（PPU）是建築許可主管機關。所有固定戶外構築物須滿足適用的安提瓜和巴布達建築規範要求，包括適合四至五級颶風暴露的風荷載抗力。安提瓜和巴布達消防局的消防安全批准須與PPU建築許可批准同步或隨後取得。對於與商業或工業場地太陽能光伏系統共址的BESS項目，與PPU和消防局的建築許可和消防安全協調應在設計階段啟動。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認安提瓜針對BESS集裝箱式外殼的專項建築規範要求。

standards_or_laws: Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Act — building permit authority for fixed structures including BESS enclosures
ASCE 7 — Minimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria for Buildings and Other Structures (wind load provisions for Category 4–5 hurricane zones)
NFPA 855 — separation distances and fire compartment requirements relevant to BESS enclosure siting
Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service — fire safety approval for commercial and industrial BESS installations

summary.en: In China, fixed BESS enclosures and containerised BESS installations are governed by GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for Design of Electric Energy Storage Station) for site design, GB 50016 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings) for building fire safety, and local planning authority approval. Chinese building permit and fire safety approval procedures are completely separate from and not recognised by Antigua and Barbuda's PPU and Fire Service. BESS enclosures designed and permitted in China for domestic installation must undergo a fresh building permit and fire safety review process in Antigua and Barbuda.
summary.zh: 在中国，固定式BESS外壳和集装箱式BESS装置受GB/T 51048-2014（电化学储能电站设计规范）场地设计规定、GB 50016（建筑设计防火规范）建筑消防安全规定以及地方规划主管机关审批管控。中国建筑许可和消防安全审批程序与安提瓜和巴布达PPU和消防局的程序完全不同，不被认可。在中国针对国内安装取得设计和许可的BESS外壳，须在安提瓜和巴布达重新进行建筑许可和消防安全审查程序。
summary.zht: 在中國，固定式BESS外殼和集裝箱式BESS裝置受GB/T 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站設計規範）場地設計規定、GB 50016（建築設計防火規範）建築消防安全規定以及地方規劃主管機關審批管控。中國建築許可和消防安全審批程序與安提瓜和巴布達PPU和消防局的程序完全不同，不被認可。在中國針對國內安裝取得設計和許可的BESS外殼，須在安提瓜和巴布達重新進行建築許可和消防安全審查程序。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 51048-2014 — 电化学储能电站设计规范 (Code for Design of Electric Energy Storage Station; not applicable in Antigua and Barbuda)
GB 50016-2014 (2018 edition) — 建筑设计防火规范 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings; not applicable in Antigua and Barbuda)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese building permits and fire safety approvals for BESS enclosures are not transferable to Antigua and Barbuda. Exporters and project developers must: (a) engage the Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Unit for building permit requirements for fixed BESS structures, including hurricane wind-load compliance; (b) engage the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service for fire safety design requirements, including NFPA 855 siting, separation distances, and suppression system requirements; (c) ensure BESS containerised enclosures shipped from China include as-built structural drawings demonstrating compliance with applicable wind-load standards (ASCE 7 or equivalent) for Caribbean hurricane-zone deployment; (d) coordinate PPU and Fire Service approvals in parallel to avoid commissioning delays.
gap.zh: 差距：中国BESS外壳的建筑许可和消防安全批准不可转用于安提瓜和巴布达。出口商和项目开发商须：（a）与安提瓜和巴布达规划局接触，了解固定式BESS构筑物的建筑许可要求，包括飓风风荷载合规；（b）与安提瓜和巴布达消防局接触，了解消防安全设计要求，包括NFPA 855场地要求、隔离距离和抑制系统要求；（c）确保从中国运输的BESS集装箱外壳随附竣工结构图，证明符合适用于加勒比飓风带部署的风荷载标准（ASCE 7或等效标准）；（d）并行推进PPU和消防局审批，以避免调试延误。
gap.zht: 差距：中國BESS外殼的建築許可和消防安全批准不可轉用於安提瓜和巴布達。出口商和項目開發商須：（a）與安提瓜和巴布達規劃局接觸，了解固定式BESS構築物的建築許可要求，包括颶風風荷載合規；（b）與安提瓜和巴布達消防局接觸，了解消防安全設計要求，包括NFPA 855場地要求、隔離距離和抑制系統要求；（c）確保從中國運輸的BESS集裝箱外殼隨附竣工結構圖，證明符合適用於加勒比颶風帶部署的風荷載標準（ASCE 7或等效標準）；（d）並行推進PPU和消防局審批，以避免調試延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — building permit from PPU required for all fixed BESS structures; fire safety approval from Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service required before commissioning
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — local planning authority and fire authority approval required for BESS installations in China; not applicable or transferable to Antigua and Barbuda

source.publisher: Government of Antigua and Barbuda — Physical Planning Unit / Ministry of Works

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Building permits from the Antigua and Barbuda Physical Planning Unit and fire safety approvals from the Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service are mandatory project gates for fixed BESS installations. Chinese building and fire safety approvals are not transferable. BESS containerised enclosures must be structurally compliant with Caribbean hurricane wind-load standards. Engage PPU and the Fire Service in parallel at the design stage to map approval requirements and avoid commissioning delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安提瓜和巴布达规划局的建筑许可和安提瓜和巴布达消防局的消防安全批准是固定式BESS装置的强制项目门槛。中国的建筑和消防安全批准不可转用。BESS集装箱外壳须在结构上符合加勒比飓风风荷载标准。应在设计阶段同步与PPU和消防局接触，规划审批要求并避免调试延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安提瓜和巴布達規劃局的建築許可和安提瓜和巴布達消防局的消防安全批准是固定式BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。中國的建築和消防安全批准不可轉用。BESS集裝箱外殼須在結構上符合加勒比颶風風荷載標準。應在設計階段同步與PPU和消防局接觸，規劃審批要求並避免調試延誤。
